name: SPY/TLT Strategy
description: Cross-asset rotation strategy trading the SPY/TLT ETF pair. Uses TLT's SMA crossover to switch between equity (SPY) and bond (TLT) exposure. Based on the inverse correlation between equities and treasuries (risk-on / risk-off regime detection). Weekly allocation decision using a momentum-modified Sharpe ratio to determine optimal SPY vs TLT weighting.
author: Botnet101

name: TTP VIX Spy
description: VIX-based regime detection indicator that monitors CBOE VIX relative to its rolling percentile to classify market volatility regimes (low / elevated / high fear). Maps VIX percentile to SPY position sizing tiers. Used as a volatility-targeting signal to scale equity exposure inversely to prevailing realized volatility, capturing the volatility risk premium while managing drawdown during fear spikes.
author: TheTradingParrot

name: RSI - S&P Sector ETFs
description: Multi-asset RSI indicator displaying relative strength readings for all 9 SPDR Select Sector ETFs (XLK, XLV, XLF, XLE, XLU, XLY, XLP, XLI, XLB) simultaneously. Identifies the highest-momentum sectors via RSI ranking, enabling a systematic sector rotation strategy that overweights the top N sectors by relative momentum each week.
author: All_Verklempt
